title: Jump Disintegration Transition (AI)
result_description: A jump that disintegrates mid-air into an AI transition — looks advanced but it's a quick AI + CapCut workflow from one jump clip.

inputs.name: jump_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Film yourself running and jumping forward.

inputs.name: jump_screenshot
inputs.what_to_film: A screenshot saved from the exact moment you jump up.

ai_generation.prompt_strategy: use the disintegration effect; creator gates the exact prompt (comment 'Jump') — author at runtime

timing.cue: the frame you took the screenshot (the jump up)

edit_steps.note: join the AI disintegration clip right after the split so the jump dissolves into the transition

result.description: Jump dissolves into an AI disintegration transition.
success_criteria: Cut lands exactly on the screenshot frame
AI clip starts from the same pose (seamless hand-off)
Disintegration reads as a clean transition

narration_transcript: First, film a clip of yourself running and jumping forward. Then open the video and go to the exact moment you jump up. Take a screenshot here and save it. Next, go to Google and search for Hixfield DisintegrationRedditor. Click on the link. This is where you can find the effect. Hit Generate. On the start frame, upload the screenshot.endif and I'll send the prompt over to you. Click Generate and Hixfield will create a video for you. Open CapCut. Click on the link. Go to the point where you took the screenshot, hit Split and
